reoffice-core-3.5.2.2/vcl/prj

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

/usr/local/bin/bash
cd /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-core-3.5.2.2
source ./Env.Host.sh
cd vcl
gmake clean # optional
gmake -r
